analysis.cascade_summary: Heparin shortages will cascade as hospitals rely on each other and have alternative suppliers, while Epinephrine disruptions will compound due to similar supply chain vulnerabilities.

high_risk_scenarios.cascade_reason: Shortest remaining supply and reliance on Lupin, which may not be able to fulfill orders in time.
high_risk_scenarios.48hr_patient_harm: Patients at risk of severe bleeding or heart complications if treatment is delayed or inadequate.

high_risk_scenarios.cascade_reason: Second-shortest remaining supply and reliance on Sun Pharma, which may not be able to fulfill orders in time.
high_risk_scenarios.48hr_patient_harm: Patients at risk of increased bleeding and heart complications if Heparin is unavailable or delayed.
